changes.summary: Added CreatePollUseCase (BC-07): future-vision guard, pollCost balance check against GLOBAL_COMMUNITY_ID wallet, poll persistence, and inv-01 poll_creation fee debit via WalletService. Exposes createCreatePollUseCase factory.

Added CastPollUseCase (BC-07): inv-02 quota-first split via GetRemainingQuotaUseCase.forPublicationCreate and role/quotaRecipients gates; inv-01 wallet debit (poll_cast) before cast; poll aggregate update. Exposes createCastPollUseCase factory.

polls.create and polls.cast delegate to use cases; removed inline getRemainingQuota helper and duplicated fee/quota orchestration. Router retains permission check (create) and API enrichment on create.

notes: Cast quota path uses GetRemainingQuotaUseCase.forPublicationCreate (same aggregation as former router helper: votes + poll_casts + quota_usage). Poll create fee remains global-wallet-only (no quota), matching existing behavior.
